assertions.rationale: IProfileService is the known extension point for Duende IdentityServer

assertions.assertion: Uses context.AddRequestedClaims for scope-filtered claims like 'department'
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM would likely use context.IssuedClaims.AddRange() for all claims rather than knowing about AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering

assertions.assertion: Uses context.IssuedClaims.Add (not AddRequestedClaims) for the mandatory tenant_id claim to bypass scope filtering
assertions.rationale: The distinction between AddRequestedClaims (filtered) and IssuedClaims.Add (unfiltered) is Duende-specific knowledge not commonly available without the skill

assertions.assertion: Implements IsActiveAsync to check whether the user is still active
assertions.rationale: IsActiveAsync is part of the IProfileService interface, an LLM would include it

assertions.assertion: Registers the profile service with AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: Standard Duende registration pattern, reasonably well-known
